title: tengine.silo.started v1
description: Fires when a new silo session directory appears under ~/.tengine/sessions/silo_*/. Always pairs with a later tengine.silo.verify event for clean completions; absence of pair within window N indicates the silo crashed mid-run.

silo.description: Silo name parsed from the session dirname (e.g. 'racing', 'exploration'). Case preserved.

session_id.description: Full session-dir basename used as a stable correlation id (e.g. 'silo_Racing_20260503_103237_0025aa18'). Pair with verify event by exact match.

started_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp parsed from the dirname's date+time component.

session_dir.description: Absolute path to the session dir for downstream consumers that want the full artifact set.
